overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Assassin's Creed Origins depicting an ancient Egyptian tannery district during golden hour. The player character walks through an open-air leatherworking area with dyeing vats and hanging hides, then transitions to a close-up of a craftsman sewing leather.

scene_state.functional_zone: ancient tannery with wooden canopy and dyeing vats

events.description: camera slows and turns slightly right to focus on the seated leatherworker
woman in dress walks through the tannery from right to left

agents.ego_description: walking slowly through the tannery courtyard, observing the leatherworking activities and surroundings

notable_agents.action: seated leatherworker scraping and treating a large hide on a workbench
worker tending to hides near the stone dyeing vats in the background

entered.detail: rustic wooden pole and beam structure providing partial shade over the work area
rectangular stone basins filled with yellow tanning liquid
dark leather skins hanging from ropes beneath the canopy to dry
large classical temple with columns visible on the hillside in the distance

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on an ancient Egyptian tannery during golden hour, with long shadows cast across the stone pavement. The camera moves through a wooden canopy structure where leather hides hang from ropes to dry. Stone vats filled with yellow dye liquid line the left side, while workers process hides at various stations. In the background, a grand temple sits atop a hill overlooking the city.

events.description: scene transitions via dissolve effect to a close-up view of a seated craftsman
seated craftsman looks up from his work and adjusts his sitting position

agents.ego_description: stationary camera focusing on the craftsman, with slight panning to capture the work details

notable_agents.action: seated craftsman sewing and working on a piece of leather, occasionally looking up
worker stirring or tending to a large circular vat in the background

entered.detail: sunlit stone pavement with scattered straw or fiber materials
large circular stone basin with a worker standing inside it
dark rectangular doorway in the stone building facade

segments.scene_description: Following a dissolve transition, the scene shifts to an open courtyard where a craftsman sits on a wooden stool sewing leather. The warm golden hour light illuminates the stone ground scattered with leatherworking debris. In the background, another worker tends to a large circular vat, while the surrounding architecture features weathered stone walls and dark doorways typical of ancient Egyptian construction.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a bustling ancient Egyptian tannery that narrows from a wide industrial district to an intimate view of a single craftsman. It begins under a wooden canopy where leather hides hang from ropes and stone vats of yellow dye line the pavement, all cast in the long shadows of golden hour with a grand temple visible on a distant hill. As the perspective shifts, the expansive workspace gives way to an open courtyard scattered with leatherworking debris. The scene then focuses on a craftsman seated on a wooden stool sewing leather, while another worker tends to a large circular vat against a backdrop of weathered stone walls and dark doorways.
